issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete. Effect requires: (1) look at 7 cards from top of deck, (2) play up to 1 Upper Yard from those 7, (3) place rest at bottom in any order. Current DSL only searches for Upper Yard without the deck inspection and reordering mechanics.
Missing action to handle the 'rest' of the 7 cards (the non-Upper Yard cards) and place them at bottom of deck in any order. This is a core part of the effect.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] Look at 7 cards from the top of your deck and play up to 1 [Upper Yard]. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.
